suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document preferred patterns for non-critical error discarding in Go tests: use `_ = fn()` rather than `//nolint:errcheck` comments for cleaner code.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: sandbox-runtime-go-lint-hygiene feature used this pattern consistently in provider_test.go and api.go for Encode, Write, Fprintf calls.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document t.Setenv() as the preferred method for test environment management in Go tests, replacing os.Setenv/os.Unsetenv pairs. t.Setenv automatically handles cleanup via t.Cleanup().
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: sandbox-runtime-go-lint-hygiene feature replaced 6-line defer cleanup with single t.Setenv calls in provider_test.go.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document SQLite persistence patterns for go-choir: use modernc.org/sqlite driver with WAL mode (PRAGMA journal_mode=WAL) and SetMaxOpenConns(1) to match the auth store pattern.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: runtime-types-store-foundation feature correctly followed this pattern in internal/store/store.go.

rejectedObservations.observation: Request to extract shared helper for parseBedrockResponse and parseAnthropicResponse
rejectedObservations.reason: Code duplication is minor (2 functions, ~10 lines each) and they may diverge as providers evolve. Not worth abstraction cost at this time.

rejectedObservations.observation: Suggestion to log json.Unmarshal errors in convertRawMessages
rejectedObservations.reason: Error is intentionally discarded as malformed messages are skipped gracefully. Logging would add noise for expected edge cases in conversation history conversion.

rejectedObservations.observation: Suggestion to change extractToolCalls to return empty slice instead of nil
rejectedObservations.reason: Semantically equivalent; nil is the idiomatic zero value for slices in Go. The current behavior is correct and consistent with Go conventions.

featureReviews.summary: 2265 lines across 7 files. Core runtime types, EventBus with pub/sub, SQLite persistence with WAL. 36 tests pass.
Authenticated API trio (/api/agent/task, /api/agent/status, /api/events SSE). Defense-in-depth auth, caller scoping, restart-safe recovery. 41 tests pass.
Bedrock and Z.AI providers with Bearer auth, error sanitization, redacted logging. 31 tests pass.
3187 lines across 12 files. ToolRegistry (Go function calls), RunToolLoop (25-iteration limit), AgentChannel, ChannelManager. 61 tests pass.
Provider-to-runtime tool-use bridge. Structured content block preservation, extractToolCalls, convertRawMessages. 15 tests pass. 4 minor non-blocking style issues noted.
TaskRunner Svelte component, runtime.js API client, sessionStorage reattachment, duplicate submission prevention. 9 Playwright tests pass.
Fixed 23 golangci-lint issues: 18 errcheck, 1 ineffassign, 3 staticcheck, 1 unused. All validators pass.
